hypothesis: E-48: Size-adaptive soft_mask. E-46 showed soft_mask helps small/large IoU (+0.047/+0.010) and reduces scale_mismatch (-71) but hurts tiny IoU (-0.044). This experiment tests whether size-dependent Gaussian blur sigma can preserve tiny-object hard boundaries while keeping small/large gains. Real PNG masks are softened with sigma proportional to bbox area: tiny(area<0.01): sigma=0 (hard); small(area<0.05): sigma=0.5; medium(area<0.15): sigma=1.0; large(area>=0.15): sigma=1.5. Bbox-only samples use hard rectangles (no soft_bbox). If pf_mIoU >= E-46 AND IoU_tiny >= E-45, size-aware Teacher route is validated.
head: dense_fg_aux
